---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new page, section, or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who benefits?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to see.

## Pages Affected

Which pages would this change? (Home, Solutions, Lookbook, Our Story, Contact, Product)

## Reference / Inspiration

Links to designs, competitor sites, or mockups that show what you have in mind.

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or mockups.
